110261.name: Operation Cacao
110261.description: Take a slight breather and increase velocity when in the front part of the pack and detecting another runner coming from behind on a corner mid-race.
110261.descriptionGametora: During any Middle Leg corner, if you detect another girl right behind you, your speed will increase and stamina will recover

110301.name: Every Rose Has Its Fangs
110301.description: Drain endurance from runners in front and moderately increase velocity when well-positioned mid-race.
110301.descriptionGametora: During the Middle Leg, if you're in the first half of the pack but aren't in the lead, your speed will slightly increase, your stamina will recover, and you will drain stamina from all enemies ahead of you

110371.name: Guten Appetit ♪
110371.description: Draw extra strength from pride, increasing velocity continuously on the final straight if the skill user passed another runner at least 2 times on the final corner or later.
110371.descriptionGametora: If you've overtaken at least two other girls after entering the Final Corner, then on the Final Straight, your speed will increase

110381.name: One True Color
110381.description: If positioned toward the front with 350m or less remaining and there is another Umamusume close behind, the determination to stay ahead makes it easier to break out of the pack.
110381.descriptionGametora: If you're in a good position with less than 350m remaining in the race and there's another girl right behind you, your speed and acceleration will increase

110401.name: Dancing in the Leaves
110401.description: Increase ability to break out of the pack when engaged in a challenge in midpack on the final corner.
110401.descriptionGametora: If you're blocked in the middle of the pack at the final corner, it will become easier to get out

110451.name: Give Mummy a Hug ♡
110451.description: Increase ability to break out of the pack when well-positioned and close to the runner ahead on the final straight.
110451.descriptionGametora: If you're in front after the final corner and about to overtake another girl, your speed and acceleration will increase

110521.name: 114th Time's the Charm
110521.description: Give max effort when far from the lead on the final corner, moderately increasing velocity steadily for a duration proportional to distance from the lead.
110521.descriptionGametora: The farther you are from the front during the final corner, the more will your speed increase

110561.name: Bountiful Harvest
110561.description: Increase velocity with a surge of great fortune when pressured by another runner toward the back in the second half of the race.
110561.descriptionGametora: During the second half of the race, if you're not in the front and someone is trying to overtake you, your speed will increase

110591.name: Wherever This Wonder Leads
110591.description: If positioned midpack on a downhill just before late-race and there's a large distance left to the finish, enjoy the race to the fullest, increasing velocity.
110591.descriptionGametora: If you're in the middle of the pack on a downhill late into the race, your speed will increase

110601.name: Go☆Go☆Goal!
110601.description: If the user passes another runner on the final corner or later, increase velocity from the midpack onward on the final straight. If the user isn't one of the top favorites, muster resolve to keep steadily increasing velocity.
110601.descriptionGametora: If you're in the middle of the pack during the Final Straight, and you've overtaken someone since entering the final corner, your speed will increase (bonus duration if you're not popular)

110611.name: Louder! Tracen Cheer!
110611.description: If the user stays toward the very back during the first half of the race without being rushed, unleash fighting spirit to increase acceleration on the final straight.
110611.descriptionGametora: If you stay near the back of the pack without panicking during the first half of the race, your acceleration will increase on the Final Straight

120011.name: Dreams Donned with Pride!
120011.description: If the user activates another skill on the final corner late-race, take the crowd's cheers to heart and moderately increase velocity. If racing at Nakayama Racecourse, greatly increase velocity instead.
120011.descriptionGametora: If you activate any skill on the Final Corner, your speed will increase; the effect is stronger in Nakayama

120131.name: Your Smile Sparkles as the Waves
120131.description: When positioned in the front part of the pack in the second half of the race, start a long spurt based on remaining endurance, slightly increasing velocity continuously.
120131.descriptionGametora: If you're in front in the second half of the race, your speed will increase; bonus duration depending on your remaining stamina

900371.name: Schwarzes Schwert
900371.description: Slightly increase velocity when 3rd or worse on the final straight after racing calmly. If the user has maintained position in midpack, moderately increase velocity instead.
900371.descriptionGametora: If you haven't panicked (kakari) during the race and you're 3rd or worse during the Final Straight, your speed will increase; bonus speed if you've been in the middle of the pack for the entire race

900381.name: #LookatCurren
900381.description: Very slightly begin to advance when passing another runner while well-positioned around halfway through the race.
900381.descriptionGametora: Gain momentum while in a good position when overtaking someone in the middle leg

900391.name: A Princess Must Seize Victory!
900391.description: Slightly increase velocity when engaged in a challenge on the final straight.
900391.descriptionGametora: If you struggle for victory on the last straight, your speed will increase

900401.name: KEEP IT REAL.
900401.description: Very slightly increase acceleration continuously when starting to make a move from midpack in the second half of the race.
900401.descriptionGametora: In the second half of the race, if you're about to overtake someone from the middle of the pack, your speed will slightly increase

900411.name: Genius x Bakushin = Victory
900411.description: Slightly increase velocity when engaged in a challenge toward the front in the second half of the race.
900411.descriptionGametora: During the later half of the race, your speed increases when competing for the lead

900441.name: Victory belongs to me—Strelitzia! ☆
900441.description: If positioned toward the back and racing calmly until the start of the final corner, when there are 300m remaining, slightly increase velocity continuously.
900441.descriptionGametora: If you stay in the second half of the pack for the entire race without panicking, you will speed up on the Final Corner or beyond when there's 300 m remaining in the race

900451.name: Pure Heart
900451.description: Moderately recover endurance when well-positioned mid-race.
900451.descriptionGametora: At a random point during the Middle Leg, if you're in the top 40% but not first, your stamina will greatly recover

900461.name: SPARKLY☆STARDOM
900461.description: Become very slightly empowered to keep the advantage when positioned toward the front and close to the runner behind on a straight mid-race.
900461.descriptionGametora: If you're in the front during a Middle Leg straight and competing for position, your speed and acceleration will increase

900481.name: Pop & Polish
900481.description: Slightly increase velocity when pressured or trying to pass another runner toward the front on the final straight.
900481.descriptionGametora: If you're in the front during the Final Straight and you've been trying to overtake someone or someone has been trying to overtake you, your speed will increase

900501.name: Nemesis
900501.description: Slightly increase velocity when moving up from midpack on the final corner or later.
900501.descriptionGametora: If you're overtaking someone on the Final Corner or beyond from the middle of the pack, your speed will increase

900511.name: Budding Blossom
900511.description: If the user engaged in a challenge on a mid-race corner, slightly increase acceleration when well-positioned late-race at least halfway through the final corner.
900511.descriptionGametora: If you're trying to push for the front near the end of the race, your acceleration will increase

900521.name: Super-Duper Climax
900521.description: Slightly recover endurance with a glance at nearby runners when positioned toward the back on the final corner.
900521.descriptionGametora: If you're in the second half of the pack during the Final Corner and there's at least one other girl nearby, your stamina will recover

900531.name: Red-Hot Discipline!
900531.description: Very minimally increase acceleration for a brief duration when closing in from the back on the final corner or later late-race. Effect and duration increase when passing (up to 3 times).
900531.descriptionGametora: During or after the Final Corner, if you're in the second half of the pack, your acceleration will increase; bonus duration and effect strength for overtaking up to 3 times

900561.name: I See Victory in My Future!
900561.description: Slightly clear a path forward depending on divination results when the way ahead is jammed late-race.
900561.descriptionGametora: When the front is packed during the Final Leg of the race, the oracle's power will open a path

unique_version.name: I See Victory in My Future!

900581.name: I Never Goof Up!
900581.description: Very slightly aim for the front when passing another runner late-race.
900581.descriptionGametora: If you overtake someone during the Final Leg or beyond, your speed and acceleration will slightly increase

900591.name: Moving Past, and Beyond
900591.description: Having run the race calmly, slightly increase acceleration when making a move mid-race, or on a crucial corner late-race whilst in midpack.
900591.descriptionGametora: If you keep your calm in the middle of the pack during a Middle or Final Leg corner, your acceleration will increase

900601.name: Just a Little Farther!
900601.description: Slightly increase velocity when positioned 3rd and about to lose late-race.
900601.descriptionGametora: When you're in 3rd place at the end of the race and about to lose, your speed increases

900611.name: Prideful King
900611.description: Moderately increase velocity in a true display of skill with 200m remaining after racing calmly.
900611.descriptionGametora: After proceeding through the race calmly, your speed drastically increases during the last 200m

900621.name: Go, Go, Mun!
900621.description: Slightly recover endurance and very slightly increase velocity when in midpack around halfway through the race.
900621.descriptionGametora: If you're in the middle of the pack in the second half of the race, your stamina will recover and your speed will increase

900641.name: Keep Pushing Ahead
900641.description: If positioned toward the front from the start of the race until the second half of the race, slightly recover endurance and very slightly increase velocity steadily.
900641.descriptionGametora: If you've been in the front of the pack for the entire first half of the race, your stamina will recover and your speed will increase

900671.name: Eternal Encompassing Shine
900671.description: If well-positioned at the start of the final straight, slightly increase velocity. If positioned near the front, moderately increase velocity instead.
900671.descriptionGametora: If you're in a good position on the last straight, your speed will increase

900681.name: Victory Cheer!
900681.description: Very slightly increase velocity when positioned toward the front on the third corner in the second half of the race. Or, very slightly kick forward when toward the front on the backstretch late-race.
900681.descriptionGametora: If you're in front of the pack, your speed will increase at the third corner (if it's in the second half of the race), or alternatively, your acceleration will increase near the end of the race

900691.name: Ambition to Surpass the Sakura
900691.description: Slightly increase velocity when well-positioned and close to the runner ahead with 300m or less remaining.
900691.descriptionGametora: If you are in a good position with less than 300 meters remaining and catching up to the girl in front of you, your speed will increase

900711.name: A Lifelong Dream, A Moment's Flight
900711.description: Slightly consume endurance to moderately increase velocity for a moderate duration when close to the runner behind on the final straight.
900711.descriptionGametora: If there's another girl right behind you during the Final Straight, use a little of your stamina in exchange for a significant increase in speed

unique_version.name: A Lifelong Dream, A Moment's Flight

900721.name: Peerless Dance of Flowering Flames
900721.description: If the user passed another runner on the final corner or later, slightly increase velocity when in the front part of the pack with 300m or less remaining.
900721.descriptionGametora: If you've overtaken someone during or after the Final Corner, your speed will increase in the last 300 meters if you're in front of the pack

900741.name: Lovely Spring Breeze
900741.description: From the midpack in the second half of the race, minimally increase velocity steadily for a duration based on remaining endurance.
900741.descriptionGametora: In the second half of the race, if you're in the middle of the pack, your speed will increase (the more stamina you have remaining, the longer the duration)

910011.name: Dazzl'n ♪ Diver
910011.description: Slightly recover endurance after activating 2 skills mid-race.
910011.descriptionGametora: During the Middle Leg, if you activate at least two skills and are in the middle of the pack, your speed will increase and your stamina will recover

910031.name: Certain Victory
910031.description: Moderately increase velocity on the final straight after being on the heels of another runner toward the front on the final corner or later.
910031.descriptionGametora: If you're chasing after another girl in the front during the Final Corner or beyond, your speed on the Final Straight will increase

910041.name: A Kiss for Courage
910041.description: Slightly increase velocity when positioned toward the front in the second half of the race after recovering endurance with a skill.
910041.descriptionGametora: In the second half of the race, increase speed when you recover stamina with your skills while being in front

910051.name: Ravissant
910051.description: When passing another racer at the front part of the pack on the final corner or later, moderately increase velocity for a moderate duration.
910051.descriptionGametora: If you overtake someone in the front during the Final Corner, your speed will greatly increase

910061.name: Festive Miracle
910061.description: Very slightly control breathing and kick forward toward victory in the second half of the race after recovering endurance with skills at least 3 times.
910061.descriptionGametora: If you activate at least 3 recovery skills, then in the second half of the race, your speed and acceleration will increase, and you'll recover more stamina

910071.name: 564 Escapades
910071.description: Minimally increase velocity sometime in the second half of the race and activate 1 rare skill regardless of its conditions.
910071.descriptionGametora: At a random point in the second half of the race, your speed will increase and you will activate two of your gold skills at random, ignoring their conditions

910101.name: Joyful Voyage!
910101.description: If positioned toward the front with 200m remaining, slightly increase velocity. Then, if also positioned near the leading Umamusume, move minimally forward.
910101.descriptionGametora: With 200 meters remaining in the race, your target speed will increase if you're near the front, and you will also immediately speed up if you're close to the first position

910111.name: Superior Heal
910111.description: Moderately recover endurance when overtaken toward the back mid-race.
910111.descriptionGametora: During the Middle Leg, if you're not in the front and someone overtakes you, your stamina will greatly recover

910131.name: Legacy of the Strong
910131.description: Slightly increase velocity continuously when pressured toward the front late-race on the final corner or later.
910131.descriptionGametora: During the Final Corner or beyond, if you're in the top 4 and someone is about to overtake you, your speed will increase

910141.name: Condor's Fury
910141.description: Slightly increase acceleration when aiming for the front from midpack on the final corner.
910141.descriptionGametora: During the last corner, gain acceleration when aiming for the lead from the middle of the pack

910151.name: Barcarole of Blessings
910151.description: Slightly increase velocity when positioned in the front part of the pack with 400m remaining. If the skill user has activated at least 7 skills, increase velocity moderately instead.
910151.descriptionGametora: If you're in the front with 400 m remaining in the race, your speed will increase; bonus speed if you've activated at least 7 skills

910171.name: Arrows Whistle, Shadows Disperse
910171.description: Slightly increase velocity continuously on the last corner and later when pressured while in the front of the pack late-race.
910171.descriptionGametora: If someone has been trying to overtake you in the first half of the pack during the Final Leg or beyond, then on the Final Corner, your speed will increase

910181.name: Eternal Moments
910181.description: Slightly increase velocity when starting to make a move from a position toward the front mid-race.
910181.descriptionGametora: If you're near the front during the Middle Leg and try to overtake someone, your speed will increase

910201.name: Break It Down!
910201.description: Slightly increase velocity when positioned toward the front on a late-race straight. If it's the backstretch, also minimally increase acceleration.
910201.descriptionGametora: During the Final Leg or beyond, if you're in the front during any straight, your speed will increase; if the straight is on the opposite side from the audience, your acceleration will slightly increase too

910221.name: Best day ever
910221.description: If well-positioned late-race on the final corner or later, slightly increase velocity. If there's a large distance left to the finish, also increase acceleration very minimally.
910221.descriptionGametora: If you're in a good position during the Final Corner or beyond, your speed will increase; if there's still more than 400m left in the race, your acceleration will increase too

910231.name: Presents from X
910231.description: Slightly increase velocity mid-race after staying well-positioned from the start of the race up until the second half.
910231.descriptionGametora: If you maintain good position from the start to the second half of the race, your speed will increase

910241.name: Flowery☆Maneuver
910241.description: Slightly increase velocity when passing another runner toward the front on the final corner or later. If passing toward the back, slightly increase acceleration instead.
910241.descriptionGametora: If you overtake someone during the Final Corner or beyond, then: 1) if you're in the front, your speed will increase; 2) if you're in the middle of the pack, your acceleration will increase

910261.name: Operation Cacao
910261.description: Take a minimal breather and slightly increase velocity when in the front part of the pack and there's another runner coming from behind on a corner mid-race.
910261.descriptionGametora: During any Middle Leg corner, if you detect another girl right behind you, your speed will increase and stamina will recover

910301.name: Every Rose Has Its Fangs
910301.description: Slightly drain endurance from runners in front and very slightly increase velocity when well-positioned mid-race.
910301.descriptionGametora: During the Middle Leg, if you're in the first half of the pack but aren't in the lead, your speed will slightly increase, your stamina will recover, and you will drain stamina from all enemies ahead of you

910371.name: Guten Appetit ♪
910371.description: Slightly increase velocity continuously on the final straight if the skill user passed another runner at least 2 times on the final corner or later.
910371.descriptionGametora: If you've overtaken at least two other girls after entering the Final Corner, then on the Final Straight, your speed will increase

910381.name: One True Color
910381.description: If positioned toward the front with 350m remaining and there is another Umamusume close behind, break out of the pack slightly more easily.
910381.descriptionGametora: If you're in a good position with less than 350m remaining in the race and there's another girl right behind you, your speed and acceleration will increase

910401.name: Dancing in the Leaves
910401.description: Very slightly increase ability to break out of the pack when engaged in a challenge in midpack on the final corner.
910401.descriptionGametora: If you're blocked in the middle of the pack at the final corner, it will become easier to get out

910451.name: Give Mummy a Hug ♡
910451.description: Very slightly increase ability to break out of the pack when well-positioned and close to the runner ahead on the final straight.
910451.descriptionGametora: If you're in front after the final corner and about to overtake another girl, your speed and acceleration will increase

910521.name: 114th Time's the Charm
910521.description: Give max effort when far from the lead on the final corner, very slightly increasing velocity steadily for a duration proportional to distance from the lead.
910521.descriptionGametora: The farther you are from the front during the final corner, the more will your speed increase

910561.name: Bountiful Harvest
910561.description: Slightly increase velocity with a surge of fortune when pressured by another runner toward the back in the second half of the race.
910561.descriptionGametora: During the second half of the race, if you're not in the front and someone is trying to overtake you, your speed will increase

910591.name: Wherever This Wonder Leads
910591.description: If positioned midpack on a downhill just before late-race and there's a large distance left to the finish, slightly increase velocity.
910591.descriptionGametora: If you're in the middle of the pack on a downhill late into the race, your speed will increase

910601.name: Go☆Go☆Goal!
910601.description: If the user passed another runner on the final corner or later, slightly increase velocity from the midpack onward on the final straight. If the user isn't one of the top favorites, keep steadily increasing velocity slightly.
910601.descriptionGametora: If you're in the middle of the pack during the Final Straight, and you've overtaken someone since entering the final corner, your speed will increase (bonus duration if you're not popular)

910611.name: Louder! Tracen Cheer!
910611.description: If the user stayed toward the very back during the first half of the race without being rushed, slightly increase acceleration on the final straight.
910611.descriptionGametora: If you stay near the back of the pack without panicking during the first half of the race, your acceleration will increase on the Final Straight

920011.name: Dreams Donned with Pride!
920011.description: If the user activates another skill on the final corner late-race, very slightly increase velocity. If racing at Nakayama Racecourse, moderately increase velocity instead.
920011.descriptionGametora: If you activate any skill on the Final Corner, your speed will increase; the effect is stronger in Nakayama

920131.name: Your Smile Sparkles as the Waves
920131.description: When positioned in the front part of the pack in the second half of the race, start a long spurt based on remaining endurance, minimally increasing velocity continuously.
920131.descriptionGametora: If you're in front in the second half of the race, your speed will increase; bonus duration depending on your remaining stamina

unique_version.name: Your Smile Sparkles as the Waves

1000011.name: Carnival Bonus
1000011.description: Increase attributes by +{0}％ in the Racing Carnival. {1}％ chance to also raise runner's mood to Great. This skill will disappear when the event ends.
1000011.descriptionGametora: Bonus points will be added to the carnival points obtained. This skill will disappear at the end of the event.

1000012.name: Carnival Bonus
1000012.description: Increase attributes by +{0}％ in the Racing Carnival. {1}％ chance to also raise runner's mood to Great. This skill will disappear when the event ends.
1000012.descriptionGametora: Your stats will be raised by x％ and there is a y％ chance for your motivation to be raised to Perfect during carnival races. This skill will disappear at the end of the event.

1100011.name: Feelin' a Bit Silly
1100011.description: Greatly decrease the racer's proficiency in starting races. Effects include slow starts and reduced starting acceleration. Removed at the end of the Career playthrough.
1100011.descriptionGametora: Guarantees a late start and lowers your acceleration tremendously. This skill will disappear at the end of the training.

1200011.name: Medium Race Enthusiast
1200011.description: Increase performance in Medium Turf races. This skill is exclusive to the event.
1200011.descriptionGametora: Turf・Medium・Your Wisdom stat is increased by 60

1200021.name: Long Race Enthusiast
1200021.description: Increase performance in Long Turf races. This skill is exclusive to the event.
1200021.descriptionGametora: Turf・Long・Your Stamina stat is increased by 60

1200031.name: Mile Race Enthusiast
1200031.description: Increase performance in Mile Turf races. This skill is exclusive to the event.
1200031.descriptionGametora: Turf・Mile・Your Power stat is increased by 60
